name: Make your prompt move
thesis: One ChatGPT prompt seed becomes the storyboard, timeline, player, and final period of a Sequences launch film.

origin.rationale: The system combines OpenAI's sparse semantic dot and glyph language with the supplied motion film's portal and 2D camera grammar, while keeping the story centered on native ChatGPT and Sequences product components.

do: Use one prompt seed through every semantic role
Use the exact canonical ChatGPT knot
Keep Sequences visually dominant after the handoff
Keep the world in constant but calm 2D motion
Reserve eighth-note density for the staccato passage
avoid: Complex 3D scenes, characters, cities, or vehicles
Glass, neon, holograms, and generic particle noise
